column1: # mapping_set_title: "GDSC Gaia Catalog KoboToolbox Form v2 to Schema.org JSON-LD (Record 26: Miami-Dade Fire Stations)"

# mapping_set_description: "Full SSSOM crosswalk from KoboToolbox raw JSON (gaia_metadata_authoring_form_v2, record 26) to Schema.org JSON-LD per GDSC conventions. Generated from scratch using prompt template v2. Covers all mappable fields; -- and system fields in UNMAPPED table. No temporal metadata present in this record."

column13: comment

Each Kobo submission becomes one Schema.org Dataset. Emit @id from etl_group/table_name as https://gdsc.idsc.miami.edu/detail/{table_name}. Extend @context with qudt, xsd, pato and set @language to en.
Kobo title is the Schema.org Dataset name; direct string copy.
Dataset abstract maps exactly to schema:description; direct string copy.
Dataset landing page URL; direct string copy.
Code "odc_by" (Open Data Commons Attribution) is not in the standard CC map; flag for human review to add odc_by=https://opendatacommons.org/licenses/by/ to the rule.
Verbose legal disclaimer text maps closely to schema:usageInfo; stored as plain string since it is the county-specific usage notice.
Value is "Public Domain" (not a CC URI); cc_to_boolean should emit true for public domain declarations — flag for human review to extend rule.
Free-text access restriction note maps to schema:conditionsOfAccess; value "not provided" may be conditionally omitted in transform.
BCP-47 language code maps exactly to schema:inLanguage.
Publication date in ISO 8601 format maps exactly to schema:datePublished.
Controlled value "vector_dataset" mapped to a DefinedTerm under dct:type; inDefinedTermSet pointing to GDSC resource type vocab.
Provenance note "direct from source" has no direct Schema.org property; stored as a named PropertyValue on the dataset.
Map creator_name→Organization.name, creator_type→Organization.additionalType; wrap in Role with roleName=creator; no ROR ID present in this record.
Map publisher_name→Organization.name ("Miami-Dade County"); ROR ID not confirmed — flag for human review.
Map coverage_name→Place.name; build GeoNames additionalProperty from coverage_identifier (4164238 = Miami-Dade County) and coverage_identifier_schema_uri; bounding box supplied from iso_group/extent.
Subject terms collected into flat string array for schema:keywords; note "Emergency|" contains a trailing pipe character — strip before emitting.
Emit DefinedTerm with termCode="vector"; inDefinedTermSet pointing to GDSC dataRepresentation vocab.
Emit DefinedTerm with termCode="point"; inDefinedTermSet pointing to GDSC vector geometry vocab.
Append to spatialCoverage.additionalProperty as PropertyValue with name="Spatial Reference System" and full OGC SRS URI (EPSG:4326).

Value "-8959341.3726|2930803.5471|-8919271.5634|2994741.4368" is a pipe-delimited bounding box in EPSG:2236 projected coordinates; parse and reproject to WGS84 lat/lon before emitting as schema:GeoShape.box — requires external CRS transform step.
ISO processing level "observed" has no direct Schema.org property; stored as a named PropertyValue.

Map attribute_name→name, attribute_description→description, attribute_type→qudt:dataType (string→xsd:string, integer→xsd:integer, numeric→xsd:float, other→xsd:anyType), attribute_source→additionalProperty named attributeSource; no temporal sub-fields present in this record.

Single token "displacement-vulnerability-mitigation-tool" becomes a DataCatalog with @id=https://gdsc.idsc.miami.edu/?collection=displacement-vulnerability-mitigation-tool; always prepend root GDSC catalog.
Map sponsor_name→Organization.name and sponsor_url→Organization.url; ROR IDs for IDSC and UM Library not confirmed — flag for human review.
Verbose Miami-Dade County legal disclaimer maps to schema:disclaimer (added in Schema.org v13); same text as license_text in this record — consider deduplication in transform.
Full ArcGIS FeatureServer query URL becomes the contentUrl of a schema:DataDownload object under schema:distribution.
ArcGIS query parameter string has no Schema.org equivalent; stored as a named PropertyValue for pipeline reproducibility.
File name becomes the name field of the DataDownload object in schema:distribution.
Archive member path ("json") has no Schema.org equivalent; stored as a named PropertyValue on the DataDownload object.
Extension "json" should resolve to "application/json"; falls back to string if MIME mapping unavailable.
Format "json" should resolve to "application/json"; same as extension in this record — deduplication logic applies.
Gaia/PostGIS table name "mdc_fire_stations" is operational metadata stored as a named PropertyValue.
ETL service descriptor "api arcgis query" has no Schema.org equivalent; stored as a named PropertyValue.
Download method "wget" is an operational ETL instruction; stored as a named PropertyValue.
Last data update date in ISO 8601 format maps exactly to schema:dateModified.
one_year maps to Dublin Core accrual periodicity; resolve to MDR frequency URI (http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/frequency/ANNUAL) if needed.
Array of source column names from the ArcGIS service; no Schema.org equivalent; stored as a single named PropertyValue with array value for pipeline use.
